$comment: Per-(theme, page, viewport) pixelmatch thresholds. Ratio of differing pixels to total. Default 0.05 = 5%. Keys encode as <theme>/<page>/<viewport>.

per_key.$comment: Tighter / looser overrides when we expect more variance (e.g. mobile crops, product imagery).

skip: $comment: tuples we cannot reliably diff yet — e.g. routes that depend on real product data
